mapper.select:
SELECT COMPANY_CD AS companyCd, COMPANY_NM AS companyNm, BIZ_NO AS bizNo, CEO_NM AS ceoNm, ADDR AS addr, TEL_NO AS telNo, USE_YN AS useYn FROM MST_COMPANY WHERE 1 = 1
AND COMPANY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyNm}, '%')
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY COMPANY_CD
SELECT COMPANY_CD AS companyCd, COMPANY_NM AS companyNm, BIZ_NO AS bizNo, CEO_NM AS ceoNm, ADDR AS addr, TEL_NO AS telNo, USE_YN AS useYn FROM MST_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE MST_COMPANY SET COMPANY_NM = #{request.companyNm}, BIZ_NO = #{request.bizNo}, CEO_NM = #{request.ceoNm}, ADDR = #{request.addr}, TEL_NO = #{request.telNo}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{request.useYn}, 'Y'), UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE COMPANY_CD = #{request.companyCd}
